entities.name: OFF-FARM LED DEVELOPMENT PARADIGM

entities.description: The region where studies found rural youth are not particularly interested in agriculture

entities.name: NON-FARMING

entities.description: A research strategy combining different data collection methods

entities.description: A narrative-based tool used for collecting data

entities.name: KENYA

entities.name: RURAL DEVELOPMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Plans designed to improve the economic and social conditions of rural areas
